content:
# Diagenesis

**Summary**: The physical and chemical changes occurring in sediment after deposition.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] identified diagenetic facies to assess their effects on reservoir quality.

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] investigated the role of dolomitization in reservoir quality.

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] evaluated the impact of diagenesis on the mineralogical maturity of the phosphorites.

- [[1999-al-muhareb|Al-Muhareb, 1999]] discussed diagenesis-related processes like the dissolution of minerals by acid.

- [[2001-al-ramadan|Al-Ramadan, 2001]] investigated the diagenetic history of the Jauf Formation.

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] studied diagenesis to understand its impact on the reservoir quality of the Unayzah Formation.

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] investigated diagenetic processes including leaching, cementation, and dolomitization.

- [[2009-al-gathe|AL-GATHE, 2009]] noted the impact of diagenesis on carbonate pore systems.

- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] not directly measured but implied by the presence of vugs and cementation.

- [[2010-al-mojel|Al-Mojel, 2010]] evaluated diagenesis to determine the impact of karstification and cementation on reservoir quality.

- [[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]] not directly measured, but implied in the study of cement degradation over time.

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] investigated diagenesis to understand the cementation of peloidal grainstones.

- [[2011-al-nasser|Al-Nasser, 2011]] investigated diagenetic controls on pore geometry.

- [[2012-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2012]] Not stated in source

- [[2012-jabbar|JABBAR, 2012]] not directly used as a primary focus but implied in carbonate mineralogy.

- [[2012-kassim|KASSIM, 2012]] investigated anhydrite dissolution as a function of temperature and ion concentration.

- [[2013-al-kharraa|Al-Kharraa, 2013]] discussed the impact of compaction on pore size and T2 decay rates.

- [[2013-abdalla|Abdalla, 2013]] analyzed diagenesis to determine its impact on porosity and permeability.

- [[2014-waseem|Waseem, 2014]] analyzed diagenetic features like kaolinite and iron oxide to explain petrophysical heterogeneity.

- [[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014]] investigated diagenetic processes to determine their impact on porosity and permeability.

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] analyzed the impact of diagenesis on porosity in the Khartam Member.

- [[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014]] investigated diagenesis to identify the impact of iron--oxide cementation on porosity.

- [[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014]] investigated the impact of CO2-induced dissolution and precipitation on carbonate rocks.

- [[2015-adebayo|Adebayo, 2015]] compared CBRI to diagenesis as a mechanism for altering carbonate pore structure.

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] investigated diagenesis to understand the evolution of porosity in carbonate successions.

- [[2015-al-amri|Al-Amri, 2015]] used diagenesis as a factor to differentiate lithofacies and their impact on petrophysical quality.

- [[2015-elzain|Elzain, 2015]] evaluated diagenesis as a key driver for porosity and permeability variations.

- [[2015-ali|Ali, 2015]] investigated diagenesis including dolomitization and meteoric leaching.

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] investigated diagenesis to understand how cementation and clay alteration affected porosity.

- [[2016-bashri|Bashri, 2016]] investigated diagenetic features like dolomite and moldic porosity.

- [[2016-salih|Salih, 2016]] analyzed the impact of meteoric, marine, and burial diagenesis on porosity development.

- [[2016-radwan|Radwan, 2016]] investigated diagenesis to determine the timing of calcitization relative to other processes.

- [[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016]] investigated the impact of diagenesis on porosity and permeability.

- [[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017]] evaluated the thermal maturity of the TQMN source rock to determine gas potential.

- [[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2017-elyamani|ElYamani, 2017]] analyzed the diagenetic history of the TMF including dolomitization and silicification.

- [[2017-adam-2|Adam, 2017]] analyzed diagenesis to determine its impact on the development of porosity and permeability.

- [[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017]] evaluated diagenesis to determine its impact on reservoir quality.

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] analyzed diagenesis to understand its impact on reservoir quality.

- [[2018-butt|Butt, 2018]] investigated the diagenetic history of the Nutaysh member.

- [[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017]] discussed diagenesis as the primary cause of heterogeneity in carbonate rocks.

- [[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018]] investigated diagenetic processes like dedolomitization and micritization.

- [[2019-khan|Khan, 2019]] considered the role of mineralogical composition and cementation in determining strength.

- [[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022]] discussed the role of diagenesis in aeolian systems.

- [[2019-suleiman-3|Suleiman, 2019]] investigated mineral alteration to convert calcite into harder minerals like smithsonite.

- [[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019]] studied the impact of acid-induced mineral dissolution on core properties.

- [[2019-al-garadi|AL-GARADI, 2019]] noted how diagenesis complicates the prediction of reservoir quality in carbonate rocks.

- [[2020-opoku|Opoku, 2020]] Not directly measured but implied in the study of carbonate mineralogy and surface interactions.

- [[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020]] investigated diagenesis to understand its impact on porosity, permeability, and resistivity.

- [[2020-islam|Islam, 2020]] analyzed diagenetic factors affecting reservoir quality.

- [[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020]] investigated the impact of diagenetic processes on reservoir quality in Paleozoic formations.

- [[2020-hiba|HIBA, 2020]] noted that sand-producing formations are young and lack natural cementation.

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] analyzed diagenesis to determine its role in creating porosity and permeability.

- [[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021]] analyzed diagenetic processes including cementation and dissolution to evaluate reservoir quality.

- [[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021]] analyzed diagenesis to understand the evolution of porosity in carbonate rocks.

- [[2022-khan|Khan, 2022]] investigated diagenesis to understand the history of carbonate precipitation and dissolution.

- [[2021-lawal|LAWAL, 2021]] Not used directly as a primary measurement but implied in the study of mineral catalysis.

- [[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022]] investigated diagenetic overprint through thin-section petrography.

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] investigated the chemical-induced diagenesis resulting from the addition of salts to carbonate rocks.

- [[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022]] investigated diagenesis to determine its role in creating or reducing reservoir properties.

- [[2022-alshalan|Alshalan, 2022]] evaluated the impact of chemical interactions between mud and shale.

- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] investigated the role of diagenetic processes like silicification in QCI variations.

- [[2021-khan|KHAN, 2021]] not used directly as a primary focus of this thesis.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] investigated the impact of diagenetic processes like cementation on pore preservation.

- [[2022-salih|Salih, 2022]] investigated the role of diagenesis (dolomitization, cementation, dissolution) on sonic velocity.

- [[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022]] evaluated diagenesis impacts on reservoir continuity in the Wadi Waqb area.

- [[2022-babker|Babker, 2022]] investigated diagenesis as a major control on the petrophysical properties of the Upper Khartam Member.

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] analyzed diagenetic impacts on the reservoir quality of Al Wajh sandstones.

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] discussed diagenesis as a factor affecting rock properties.

- [[2023-omarov|Omarov, 2023]] investigated the EICP process as a form of induced cementation.

- [[2023-baig|Baig, 2023]] investigated the carbonate precipitation as a means of sand consolidation.

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] evaluated the preservation of foraminiferal tests to ensure accurate taxonomic identification.

- [[2024-allam|Allam, 2024]] investigated the impact of diagenetic processes on reservoir quality.

- [[2023-desouky|Desouky, 2023]] investigated the chemical transformation of calcite to hydroxyapatite as a form of engineered diagenesis.

- [[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024]] assessed the impact of diagenesis on foraminiferal shell chemistry.

- [[2024-hassan|Hassan, 2024]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] assessed diagenesis as a factor influencing reservoir quality and carbonate chemistry.

- [[2024-malik|Malik, 2024]] investigated diagenetic processes like chertification and dolomitization.

- [[2024-fahmi|Fahmi, 2024]] Not used in this study.

- [[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024]] investigated the alteration (diagenesis) of the pluton's minerals.

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] evaluated the role of dolomitization in preserving porosity within burrow fillings.

- [[2025-alhubail|Alhubail, 2025]] investigated the influence of maturity variations on carbonate mudrock response to CO2.

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] monitored the formation of carbonate minerals (calcite, dolomite, magnesite) during the reaction.

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] identified diagenetic features like dolomitization and recrystallization in the Hartha Formation.

- [[1992-abdulghani|Abdulghani, 1992]] analyzed diagenesis to determine its impact on reservoir porosity.

- [[2004-ahmed|Ahmed, 2004]] studied the diagenetic process of calcium sulphate precipitation.

- [[1988-darwish-2|Darwish, 1988]] investigated diagenesis to identify stages such as cementation, micritization, dissolution-precipitation, dolomitization, and calcitization.

- [[1985-ghaled|Ghaled, 1985]] investigated the diagenetic changes that led to the formation of magnesite.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] Petrographic analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Diagenetic facies were highlighted in section 5.6 (not fully detailed in provided text). ([[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017, p. 55]])


- Post-depositional dolomitization from carbonate diagenesis distributed sporadically throughout the reservoir, with linear patterns suggesting structural control. ([[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002, p. 22]])

- Post-depositionally, some beds were beneficiated by weathering and silicification. ([[1996-matter|Matter, 1996, p. 137]])

- Acidizing sandstone results primarily in dissolution of acid soluble permeability-damaging minerals. ([[1999-al-muhareb|Al-Muhareb, 1999, p. 17]])

- Processes include compaction, cementation (calcite, quartz, illite, chlorite), and dissolution. ([[2001-al-ramadan|Al-Ramadan, 2001, p. 18]])

- Compaction, cementation (calcite, clay, quartz), and dissolution were the primary diagenetic drivers for porosity change. ([[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002, p. 47]])

- Identified extensive neomorphism and dolomite replacement of calcite in the older lithofacies. ([[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988, p. 59]])

- Not stated in source ([[2009-al-gathe|AL-GATHE, 2009]])

- Cementation factor (m) is influenced by factors like degree of cementation and pore system type. ([[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009, p. 21]])

- Meteoric cementation and karst features were used as indicators for subaerial exposure during sea-level falls. ([[2010-al-mojel|Al-Mojel, 2010, p. 85]])

- Not stated in source ([[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]])

- Peloidal grainstone is cemented, requiring further study on the source of the cement. ([[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011, p. 88]])

- Geological description provided information on various depositional and diagenetic controls on pore geometry. ([[2011-al-nasser|Al-Nasser, 2011, p. 11]])

- Not stated in source ([[2012-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2012]])

- Not stated in source ([[2012-jabbar|JABBAR, 2012]])

- Anhydrite (CaSO4) dissolution was significantly promoted by decreasing calcium ions in the injected or surrounding seawater. ([[2012-kassim|KASSIM, 2012, p. 176]])

- High levels of compaction in dolomite led to smaller pores, causing faster T2 decay and NMR under-estimation. ([[2013-al-kharraa|Al-Kharraa, 2013, p. 45]])

- Identified 11 major diagenetic processes including micritization and dolomitization. ([[2013-abdalla|Abdalla, 2013, p. 87]])

- Authigenic minerals (kaolinite, chlorite) and quartz overgrowth are the primary diagenetic controls on porosity and permeability. ([[2014-waseem|Waseem, 2014, p. 103]])

- Both depositional and diagenetic controls have impacted porosity and permeability patterns in Sarah Formation. ([[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014, p. 16]])

- Cementation (calcite) and dolomitization were primary diagenetic processes affecting pore connectivity. ([[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014, p. 93]])

- Iron-oxide cements were found to potentially inhibit the development of quartz overgrowth. ([[2014-mohammedfaiz|Mohammedfaiz, 2014, p. 180]])

- Dissolution of calcite by carbonic acid led to potential porosity enhancement. ([[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014, p. 36]])

- The implication of CBRI can be likened to the effects of diagenesis since CBRI can cause dissolution of carbonate grains, enlargement of moldic pores, cementation, and dolomitization. ([[2015-adebayo|Adebayo, 2015, p. 56]])

- Early diagenesis included microbial micritization, while burial stage featured chemical compaction and neomorphism. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 20]])

- Diagenetic processes like cementation and microporosity formation significantly impacted the permeability of lithofacies 2 and 4. ([[2015-al-amri|Al-Amri, 2015, p. 67]])

- Muddy matrix protects the sediment from diagenetic fluids, leading to tighter zones in muddy facies. ([[2015-elzain|Elzain, 2015, p. 144]])

- SEM and EDS analysis showed the presence of dolomitization and diagenesis in the Dsw facies. ([[2015-ali|Ali, 2015, p. 66]])

- Diagenetic processes included iron oxide precipitation, calcite cementation, and silica overgrowth from feldspar dissolution. ([[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016, p. 115]])

- Moldic porosity was prevalent in the skeletal grains of several facies, indicating dissolution during diagenesis. ([[2016-bashri|Bashri, 2016, p. 105]])

- Meteoric diagenesis was the primary driver for moldic and vuggy porosity in intertidal facies. ([[2016-salih|Salih, 2016, p. 17]])

- A paragenetic sequence was established: 1) evaporite precipitation, 2) dolomitization, 3) chertification, 4) evaporite dissolution, 5) dolomite calcitization. ([[2016-radwan|Radwan, 2016, p. 81]])

- Meteoric diagenesis caused dissolution of aragonitic grains, while dolomitization enhanced intercrystalline porosity. ([[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016, p. 65]])

- Maturity values ranged from 0.8% to 1.25% Ro, indicating a transition from peak oil to wet gas generation. ([[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017, p. 139]])

- Not stated in source ([[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]])

- Meteoric diagenesis significantly impacted porosity by creating vuggy/moldic pores but also occluding primary porosity with cement. ([[2017-elyamani|ElYamani, 2017, p. 21]])

- Six major diagenetic processes were identified: dissolution, pore lining and pore blocking calcite cementation, dolomitization, fracturing, and stylolitization. ([[2017-adam-2|Adam, 2017, p. 31]])

- Dissolution and dolomitization enhanced reservoir quality, while cementation and compaction reduced it. ([[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017, p. 19]])

- Not stated in source ([[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]])

- Pre-compaction calcite, Fe-dolomite, and dolomite cements constitute 5-20 percent of the whole rock volume. ([[2018-butt|Butt, 2018, p. 24]])

- Diagenetic processes like dissolution and dolomitization significantly modify porosity and permeability. ([[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017, p. 26]])

- Dedolomitization in burrowed wackestone led to the highest porosity and permeability values. ([[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018, p. 17]])

- Not specifically measured, but noted as a factor influencing geomechanical properties. ([[2019-khan|Khan, 2019, p. 40]])

- Diagenesis, dependent on water presence, can lead to the formation of mud-flat deposits and cementation. ([[2022-al-alawi|Al-Alawi, 2022, p. 20]])

- Zinc sulfate was used to change the calcite into the harder mineral, smithsonite, resulting in a 35% increase in rock hardness. ([[2019-suleiman-3|Suleiman, 2019, p. 17]])

- Dissolution of silica reached up to 49 mg in a 6-inch Scioto core. ([[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019, p. 19]])

- Diagenesis results in reorganization of porosity leading to complex pore systems in carbonates. ([[2019-al-garadi|AL-GARADI, 2019, p. 21]])

- Not stated in source ([[2020-opoku|Opoku, 2020]])

- Diagenetic processes such as cementation and micro-crystallization of calcium carbonates led to the occlusion of primary pores, significantly reducing permeability. ([[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020, p. 22]])

- Kaolinite precipitation and cementation are primary factors reducing reservoir quality, while feldspar dissolution enhances it. ([[2020-islam|Islam, 2020, p. 19]])

- Silica and kaolinite cementation significantly reduced the permeability of the Tawil Formation. ([[2020-gbiyanju|Gbiyanju, 2020, p. 44]])

- Not stated in source ([[2020-hiba|HIBA, 2020]])

- Dedolomitization was likely caused by calcium sulfate solutions reacting with dolomites. ([[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021, p. 38]])

- Dissolution of detrital feldspar grains significantly enhanced visual porosity in some intervals. ([[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021, p. 18]])

- Identified several types including microbial micritization, early marine cementation, and blocky calcite cement. ([[2021-alabyadh|Alabyadh, 2021, p. 13]])

- Diagenetic events included aragonite dissolution, calcite cementation, and dolomitization during sea-level fluctuations. ([[2022-khan|Khan, 2022, p. 20]])

- Not stated in source ([[2021-lawal|LAWAL, 2021]])
